summary: Backend testing complete for Extended Analytics, Payment History, and Partner Map features. All 32 tests passed (100%). All 5 endpoints working correctly.

minor.issue: All 4 partners have null coordinates (latitude/longitude). Map will show partners but without location markers.
minor.note: This is a data issue, not a code issue. Partners need to have coordinates set.

features_verified: All time periods work: hour, day, week, month, year
Period comparison (compare=true) returns previous period data and percentage changes
Time series data returned for charts
CSV export with German headers (Datum, Umsatz, Bestellungen, Neue Nutzer, Gebote)
Type filters (deposit, withdrawal, credit, cashback, transfer)
CSV export with German headers (Datum, Typ, Beschreibung, Betrag, Referenz, Status)
Returns partner details: id, business_name, address, city, category, phone, logo_url
partner_map.note: Partners have null coordinates - need to be set for map markers

action_items: Consider adding coordinates to existing partners for map functionality
Analytics shows no revenue/orders data because no completed payments exist (expected per main agent note)
critical_code_review_comments: Extended analytics endpoint correctly implements all 5 time periods with proper date calculations
Period comparison calculates percentage changes correctly (handles division by zero)
Transaction history properly merges wallet_transactions and balance_history from users collection
Partner map correctly joins partner_accounts with merchant_cashback_settings for cashback rates
CSV exports use German headers as expected for German-language app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Extended Analytics, Payment History, and Partner Map features fully tested. All 5 endpoints working: /api/analytics/extended (with time periods and comparison), /api/analytics/export (CSV/JSON), /api/bidblitz-pay/transaction-history (with filters), /api/bidblitz-pay/export-transactions (CSV/JSON), /api/partner-search/map (public, returns cashback rates). Note: Partners have null coordinates - map will work but markers won't have positions. Analytics shows minimal data because no completed payments exist.
